What's inside

🧮

Smart Arithmetic

Full expression evaluation. Type naturally — 4 × (12 + 3) — and get your answer in real time.

Unit Converter

Length, temperature, weight, speed, and data — five categories, zero page reloads, result sent straight to the display.
